Defendants contest the court's tentative decision. Mr. Lakritz requests that should the court adopt the tentative ruling, that he be granted additional time to respond to the complaint. Mr. Skinnell states that he does not object. The court grants the request for additional time to respond. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, JOSE CISNEROS, BEN ROSENFELD AMENDED DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Petitioner states a claim for a declaration of validity of Proposition M. The facts giving rise to the tax have not yet occurred and the payment on such facts have not yet become due. Plaintiff's may obtain a declaration on essential validity of the tax without payment of the not yet accrued tax. Answer to be filed no later than January 12, 2024.
